story.description: A clip of connected habitats, biodiversity, food webs, or ecosystem interactions: majestic saguaro cactus in desert landscape
story.hook: Coral reefs are built by tiny living builders.
story.lead: Coral reefs are built by tiny living builders. Watch the reef texture, because coral animals build hard skeletons that stack into habitat. Fish, algae, and countless small creatures then use that structure like a city. The color sits on top of engineering. Which habitat next?
story.script: Coral reefs are built by tiny living builders. Watch the reef texture, because coral animals build hard skeletons that stack into habitat. Fish, algae, and countless small creatures then use that structure like a city. The color sits on top of engineering. Which habitat next?

story.description: A clip of rivers, streams, currents, waterfalls, or freshwater systems: stunning aerial view of jamuna river bangladesh
story.hook: Rivers move sideways while they flow.
story.lead: Rivers move sideways while they flow. Watch the outside of the bend, because faster water cuts that bank while slower water drops sediment inside the curve. Over time the whole river shifts across the landscape. A bend is motion written in mud. Which water shape next?
story.script: Rivers move sideways while they flow. Watch the outside of the bend, because faster water cuts that bank while slower water drops sediment inside the curve. Over time the whole river shifts across the landscape. A bend is motion written in mud. Which water shape next?

story.description: A clip of cold-climate animals: relaxing seals on a serene beach
story.hook: Seals can follow wakes with their whiskers.
story.lead: Seals can follow wakes with their whiskers. Watch the whiskers near the water, because seals can sense tiny trails left by moving fish. Those vibrations help them hunt even when the water is dark or messy. The face becomes a current detector. Which ocean sense next?

reasons: script does not expose enough concrete visual detail

story.description: A clip of dogs / puppies: woman training a dog
story.hook: Dogs can follow a human point fast.
story.lead: Dogs can follow a human point fast. Watch the eyes check the person, because dogs are unusually good at using human gestures. That skill helps them cooperate with us before any command gets repeated. The small glance is social intelligence, not random obedience. What dog skill should come next?

reasons: script does not expose enough concrete visual detail
